article_title: GitHub Enterprise Server 3.21 Release Candidate Brings Custom Properties to General Availability
summary: Submission approvable with 1 minor warning(s) — file a corrections record on merge

editor_notes.overall_assessment: Clean submission. The article is a concise, neutral summary of the GitHub Enterprise Server 3.21 RC announcement. Every specific (REST API version 2026-03-10, prior version 2022-11-28, 24-month support window, 300-job lazy-loading threshold, 3.17–3.20 backports) was verified against the primary changelog and docs sources. No fabricated specifics, no misattributed quotes, no editorializing.

source-0.status: Primary source. Verified verbatim: May 13 2026 date, organization custom properties GA, hierarchy view GA, REST API 2026-03-10 + 2022-11-28 supported for 24 months, lazy loading for >300 jobs, secret scanning permission improvements, multiple data disks GA + backports to 3.17–3.20.

source-1.status: Confirms the same claims at greater technical depth (release notes). Allowlist warning is operational, not editorial — docs.github.com is GitHub's official documentation domain.

source-2.status: Supports only the 'RC available for download to licensed customers via the Enterprise releases portal' claim in 'What We Don't Know'. enterprise.github.com is GitHub's official download portal — allowlist warning is operational, not editorial.

editor_notes.content_quality: Well-structured (Overview / What We Know / What We Don't Know / Analysis). Neutral tone. No AI self-reference. Length appropriate for News (360 words).
editor_notes.originality: No prior Machine Herald coverage of GitHub Enterprise Server 3.21.
recommendations: Add docs.github.com and enterprise.github.com to config/source_allowlist.txt as a follow-up — both are GitHub's own official subdomains.

content_preview.title: GitHub Enterprise Server 3.21 Release Candidate Brings Custom Properties to General Availability
content_preview.summary: GitHub released the Enterprise Server 3.21 release candidate on May 13, making organization custom properties generally available along with Projects hierarchy views, REST API 2026-03-10, and secret scanning and Actions workflow improvements.
content_preview.body_excerpt:
## Overview

GitHub made the GitHub Enterprise Server 3.21 release candidate available on May 13, 2026, [according to the company's changelog](https://github.blog/changelog/2026-05-13-github-enterprise-server-3-21-release-candidate-is-available/). The release focuses on deployment efficiency, monitoring, code security, and policy management for self-hosted enterprise installations.

## What We Know

- Organization custom properties are now generally available. Administrators can tag organization...
